layout.audits: proof verification and C/V/X audit outputs
layout.logs/solver_runs: captured stdout/stderr logs for CaDiCaL, Kissat, and MiniSat
layout.manifests: source evidence manifests preserving command lines and hashes
layout.proofs: CaDiCaL DRAT/LRAT/FRAT proof artifacts and extracted LRAT traces
layout.schema: external evidence manifest schema retained from consolidated source drops
layout.scripts: versioned evidence analysis and extraction scripts retained for reproducibility
layout.source_archives: zip evidence bundles plus local-only archived staging roots
layout.source_versions: versioned reports, ledgers, manifests, audits, and proof-route notes from consolidated gnatural drops

source_integration: Transient gnatural_ontological_computation version bundles have been collapsed into this canonical evidence tree; top-level drop folders are no longer active repo roots.
source_preservation: Captured logs and proof files are copied unchanged from staging evidence bundles; versioned provenance is retained under source_versions, while full legacy roots are local-only archives excluded from the refreshed manifest.
verification_note: The certified object includes this folder through json, csv, proof, log, and source-file manifests after rebuild.
